title: Mahanati Lyrics Nadigaiyar Thilagam
stanzas:
thirai minnathaan
tharai minnathaan
pudhu vinmeenaai ival vandhathale.

aan singangal thalai thookkithaan
thanai paarkathaan ival nindraale.

vizhiyal edhayum mozhivaal ival.
mozhigal kadanthum malirvaal ival.
oliyaai azhagaai polivaal ival
nilavaai nilavaai kaaikindraal.

ilagnar kanavil thinamum ival.
palarin manathil manamum ival.
silarin vizhiyil panamum ival.
thadaigal kadanthu paaikindraal.

pugazhalai thurathi
palaum alaivaare.
ivalai thurathi
pugazh alaiya kandaal.

uyara uyara thimir
valarum ooril.
vaanai adainthum
panivu ival kondaal.

ival thangai magal
annai ena vedam
ellaame eduppaal.

oru thaanam ena
evarum vara
deivam ondraagi
koduppaal.

veliyil ivale
kalangaraiyin theeyaai.
veetil ivalo
agal malgum theeyaai.

thiraiyai kadanthum
valarum oru kadhal.
arangai kadanthum
thodarum oru paadal.

azhagaai oru kanaa
kadhal kanaa
adhuve vazhvendru
irundhai.

thannule sira
vinmeen thara
konde vinnaagi
vizhundhaal.
tamilStanzas:
திரை மின்னத்தான்
தரை மின்னத்தான்
புது விண்மீனாய்
இவள் வந்ததால்.

ஆண் சிங்கங்கள் 
தலை தூக்கித்தான் 
தனை பார்க்கத்தான் 
இவள் நின்றாலே.

விழியால் எதையும் 
மொழிவால் இவள். 
மொழிகள் கடந்தும் 
மாளிர்வாள் இவள். 

ஒளியாய் அழகாய் 
பொலிவால் இவள் 
நிலவாய் நிலவாய் 
காய்கின்றாள் .

இளைஞர் கனவில் 
தினமும் இவள். 
பலரின் மனதில் 
மனமும் இவள். 

சிலரின் விழியில் 
பணமும் இவள். 
தடைகள் கடந்து
பாய்கின்றாள் .

மகாநதி .... மகாநதி... 
மகாநதி.... மகாநதி..

புகழலை துரத்தி 
பலரும் அலைவாறே. 
இவளை துரத்தி 
புகழ் அலைய கண்டாள் .

உயர உயர 
திமிர் வளரும் ஊரில். 
வானை அடைந்தும் 
பணிவை இவள்கொண்டாள் .

இவள் தங்கை மகள் 
அன்னை என 
வேடம் எல்லாமே எடுப்பாள். 
ஒரு தானாம் என எவரும் வர 
தெய்வம் ஒன்றாகி கொடுப்பாள்.

மகாநதி .... மகாநதி... 
மகாநதி.... மகாநதி..

வெளியில் இவளே 
கலங்கரையின் தீயாய். 
வீட்டில் இவளோ 
அகல் மல்கும் தீயாய்.

திரையை கடந்தும் 
வளரும் ஒரு காதல். 
அரங்கை கடந்தும் 
தொடரும் ஒரு பாடல்.

அழகாய் ஓர் கனா 
காதல் கானா 
அதுவே வழுவென்று இருந்தாய். 

தன்னுள்ளே சிற விண்மீன் 
தர கொண்டே 
விண்ணாகி விழுந்தாள்.

seo.title: Mahanati Lyrics Nadigaiyar Thilagam
seo.description: Full Mahanadi songs lyrics, Nadigaiyar Thilagam Songs Lyrics. sharable lyrics snippets, Music: Micky J Mayer, Singer(s): Anurag Kulkarani.
seo.keywords: Nadigaiyar Thilagam, Micky J Mayer, Anurag Kulkarani, Mahanadi full lyrics, Nadigaiyar Thilagam songs lyrics, Mahanadi lyrics snippets, Mahanadi WhatsApp status lyrics snippets, share Mahanadi lyrics snippets with friends, Tamil lyrics, Tamil songs

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song Mahanati?

The song Mahanati reflects themes of nostalgia and romance, celebrating the beauty and memories associated with love.

What is the plot context of the movie Nadigaiyar Thilagam?

Nadigaiyar Thilagam is a biographical film that portrays the life of legendary actress Savitri, highlighting her struggles and triumphs in the film industry.

Who is the singer of the song?

The song is sung by Anurag Kulkarani, known for his soulful renditions in Tamil cinema.

Who composed the music for Mahanati?

The music for Mahanati was composed by Micky J Mayer, who is known for his captivating melodies.

When was the song released?

The song was released on May 14, 2018.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In the song Mahanati, the listener is transported into a world of nostalgia and romance, perfectly encapsulating the essence of love. The lyrics beautifully convey the emotions of longing and admiration, reflecting the character's journey in the film Nadigaiyar Thilagam. With Anurag Kulkarani's soothing vocals, the song evokes a sense of warmth and tenderness. It serves as a poignant reminder of cherished memories and the beauty of love, making it a perfect fit for romantic occasions.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Mahanati from Nadigaiyar Thilagam is a mesmerizing melody that captures the essence of nostalgia and romance. With Anurag Kulkarani's soulful voice and Micky J Mayer's enchanting composition, this song takes you on a heartfelt journey. Experience the beauty of Tamil cinema through this evocative track that celebrates love and memories.
stanzaMeanings: She has come as a new star on the silver screen.
The lioness has lifted her head and is standing tall.
With her eyes, she speaks everything. She blooms with words. She shines beautifully like the moon.
In the dreams of the common people, she is there every day. In many hearts, she resides. In some eyes, she is wealth. She overcomes obstacles and shines.
She is praised everywhere. When you see her, praise flows.
In a place where pride grows high, if she holds the sky, it becomes humble.
She is the sister, daughter, and mother, taking everything from the scriptures.
Someone will come and give a divine gift as a blessing.
In the outside world, she is like a shining light. At home, she is a comforting light.
A love that grows beyond the screen. A song that continues beyond the stage.
Beautifully, a dream love was always there.
If she falls, she will fall like a star from the sky.
